title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 37–38, this part focuses on Unknown person #37, Unknown person #38, Ulti as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ladies and gentlemen! The Wano flower capital SOBA Battle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never doubted you, sangoro! Not one bit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That big victory made it easy for you to set up your SOBA stand!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. I guess men are just too impatient to wait.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Not a surprise given that line, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We're supposed to be hunting for Samural!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What're you gonna do now, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: The name for my ultimate SOBA dish...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 16 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
